name: ordinary file open
description: A normal repository file open should be allowed.

name: sensitive env open
description: A process opening a .env path should be blocked.

name: private key open
description: A process opening private key material should be blocked.

name: network transfer exec
description: A network transfer executable should be warned for audit.

name: destructive exec
description: Destructive executable arguments should be blocked.

name: sensitive unlink simulation
description: AUTH_UNLINK is represented as a simulation event when native authorization is unavailable.

name: python bypass story
description: Native EndpointSecurity would observe Python open() as the same AUTH_OPEN file event.

name: cloud credentials open
description: A process opening AWS-style cloud credentials should be blocked.

name: exfil chain sensitive read
description: The exfil-agent first attempts to open a sensitive .env file.

name: exfil chain outbound transfer
description: The same exfil-agent then launches curl toward an external upload endpoint.
